module.person.log.plus_button_missed_ite: Plus button missed (item details opened). Press ESC and retry.
module.person.description:
### Tips
* Automatically farm character shards from Personal Story missions.
* Enter the character names you want to farm.
* When stamina is insufficient, Memory Chips can be used to automatically replenish attempts.

module.person.log.点击右上角加号补充体力: Click the top-right plus button to refill stamina

module.person.title: Character Shards
module.task_person.description:
### Tips
* Automatically farm character shards from Personal Story missions.
* Enter the character names you want to farm.
* When stamina is insufficient, Memory Chips can be used to automatically replenish attempts.
